overall.description: A third-person gameplay view from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character standing inside 'The Three Broomsticks' tavern. The scene features detailed medieval wooden architecture with a prominent upper balcony, warm firelight illumination, and sparse NPC patrons in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: tavern main hall with upper balcony and bar area

events.description: NPC patron enters from left side of frame and walks toward the bar area

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the bar area, observing the tavern interior

notable_agents.action: patron entering the tavern and walking toward the bar
figure standing behind the bar counter, possibly the bartender

entered.detail: ornate wooden railing on the upper level overlooking the main hall with vertical balusters
carved wooden tavern sign reading 'THE THREE BROOMSTICKS' mounted on the balcony
large stone fireplace with warm glowing fire visible in the background
rustic wooden dining tables and bench seating arranged on the floor
circular iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character stands in the main hall of a medieval tavern with warm firelight illuminating the wooden interior. An upper balcony with a prominent 'The Three Broomsticks' sign overlooks the space. A patron enters from the left and walks toward the bar area where another figure stands behind the counter. The atmosphere is cozy and dimly lit with candles and fireplace glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze within the cozy, dimly lit interior of a medieval tavern. It begins in the main hall, where warm firelight and flickering candles illuminate the heavy wooden architecture. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses an upper balcony featuring a prominent sign for The Three Broomsticks overlooking the space. The scene then shifts focus as a patron enters from the left and moves toward the bar area, where another figure stands waiting behind the counter.
